name: SecureKloud Technologies Limited
summary: SecureKloud Technologies Limited provides information and technology services in the United States, India, the Middle East, North America, and internationally. The company's solutions include CloudEz, an enterprise cloud management solution; EzIAM, an user life cycle management platform; CloudAuth, a multi-factor authentication-as-a-service for governing enterprise applications; DataEz, a data lake management platform; CloudEzRX, an user life cycle management platform; and CloudEzSecure, a cloud framework that provides security, which surpasses stringent security regulations. Its solutions also comprise multi-domain identity services platform, an on-demand platform that extends the capabilities of existing identity management, SSO, and legacy services; Cassandra-as-a-Service, a combination of integrated consulting and operations to enhance agility; Automaton, a cloud platform to manage security, cost, and performance in cloud; HER, an end-to-end HER services; and EzMFA, a multi-factor authentication solution for enterprise applications. In addition, the company provides cloud transformation, identity access management, Big data, cloud data analytics, managed, and UI/UX services. It serves healthcare and pharma industries. The company was formerly known as 8K Miles Software Services Limited and changed its name to SecureKloud Technologies Limited in January 2021. SecureKloud Technologies Limited was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Chennai, India.
